name: Flash
passive: Overclock turns answer speed into burst damage for the next 4 questions.
ultimateDescription: For the next 4 questions, faster answers deal bonus damage with timing multipliers.

name: Shadow
description: You can't answer what you can't read.
passive: Void Glitch hides two enemy choices for the next 4 questions while keeping them clickable.
ultimateDescription: For the next 4 opponent questions, 2 options are visually hidden with glitch static.

name: Guardian
description: Everything you throw at me comes right back.
passive: Reflect Bastion reduces incoming damage and reflects a portion for 4 questions.
ultimateDescription: For the next 4 questions, incoming damage is reduced and part of it is reflected.

name: Blaze
description: The longer you survive, the hotter it gets.
passive: Wildfire Surge builds burn stacks for 4 questions; stacks apply repeat burn ticks.
ultimateDescription: For the next 4 questions, each correct answer adds a burn stack that deals damage over time.

name: Architect
premiumTagline: I don’t fight your game. I rewrite it.
howItPlays: Deconstruct runs for 6 questions. Your hits stay full while enemy correct answers are reduced.
passive: Deconstruct weakens opponent damage for the next 6 questions without reducing your own output.
ultimateDescription: For the next 6 questions, opponent correct answers deal reduced damage.

name: Titan
premiumTagline: I don’t lose trades. I win them.
howItPlays: Cataclysm runs for 6 questions: massive hit damage, wrong-answer self-protection, and slight resistance.
passive: Cataclysm boosts outgoing damage and grants controlled safety during risky exchanges.
ultimateDescription: For the next 6 questions, your hits are massive and wrong answers do not self-damage.
